verdicts.note: Accountability for assessment errors and transparent practices do not establish audit-and-restrain versus invest-and-expand spending policy; the basis does not match this axis.
The outsider direction and magnitude are supported, but the profile rests on a single pamphlet source; confidence should be medium rather than high.

missing.basis: Supports senior property-tax exemptions and a state homestead exemption, a clear but limited tax-relief direction.
